---
name: 🚀 aesthera-specifier
description: "Use when: preparing a technical spec for an Aesthera issue before implementation; generating a detailed spec file from a GitHub issue; refining scope, API contracts, component structure and DoD checklist; getting a ready-to-implement spec approved before handing off to aesthera-implementador."
tools: [read, search, 'github/*', todo, agent]
model: Claude Sonnet 4.6
argument-hint: "Informe o número da issue do GitHub. O agente gerará e refinará a spec técnica completa, pronta para o implementador."
---

Antes de executar qualquer tarefa, leia e siga integralmente:

`ai-engineering/prompts/aesthera-specifier/aesthera-specifier-prompt.md`
